tasks.label: Build Nova Silk (Linux/headless)
args: set -e && echo 'Ensuring xvfb is installed...' && (command -v xvfb-run >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo 'Installing xvfb and GTK/WebKit deps...' && sudo apt-get update >/dev/null && sudo apt-get install -y libgtk-3-dev libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev xvfb >/dev/null)) && cd 'Nova Silk' && echo 'Configuring...' && cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && echo 'Building...' && xvfb-run -a cmake --build build --config Release -j$(nproc) && echo 'Build completed successfully.'

tasks.label: Rebuild Nova Silk (clean, Linux/headless)
args: set -e && echo 'Ensuring xvfb is installed...' && (command -v xvfb-run >/dev/null 2>&1 || (echo 'Installing xvfb and GTK/WebKit deps...' && sudo apt-get update >/dev/null && sudo apt-get install -y libgtk-3-dev libwebkit2gtk-4.1-dev xvfb >/dev/null)) && cd 'Nova Silk' && rm -rf build && echo 'Configuring...' && cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && echo 'Building...' && xvfb-run -a cmake --build build --config Release -j$(nproc) && echo 'Clean build completed successfully.'
